---
title: "Trabajos publicados recientemente / Recent papers"
---

## 2026

- **Local agricultural transition, crisis and migration in the Southern Andes**  
  Barberena, R., Luisi, P., Novellino, P., Tessone, A., Guevara, D., García, A., Nelson, E., le Roux, P., Herrera, C., Coz, M., Candito, G., Lopopolo, M., Le Corre, M., Becerra-Valdivia, L., Iraeta-Orbegozo, M., Tressieres, G., Lucero, G., Cardillo, M., Carbajo Merler, J., Da Peña, G., Suby, J., Roux, M., de Porras, M., Acosta, C., Mallea, C., Menéndez, L., Quintana, M., López, M., Troncoso, A., Luyt, J., Gray, K., Santana Sagredo, F., Orlando, L., Duran, V., Sealy, J., Patin, E., Quintana-Murci, L., Schroeder, H., Rascovan, N.  
  *Nature*  
  https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-026-10233-z
  
  ---
  
## 2025

- **Unveiling the spatial structure of rock painting designs and information flow among hunter-gatherers in southern Patagonia**  
  Pallo, M.C., Charlin, J., Cardillo, M., Funes, P.D., Manzi, L.M.  
  *Journal of Anthropological Archaeology*

- **Applying statistical and causal modeling to interpret thermal alteration in observational lithic data**  
  Cardillo, M., Carranza, E.  
  *Peer Community Journal*  
  https://doi.org/10.24072/pcjournal.609

- **Testing Replicas of Fell IV Points as Arrowheads**  
  Charlin, J., Cardillo, M., Donadei Corada, J.P., Arriaga, L.C., Moreno, E., Shott, M.  
  *Lithic Technology*  
  https://doi.org/10.1080/01977261.2025.2577019

---

## 2024

- **Las esferas y esferoides líticos de la colección “Juan Carlos Piscia”**  
  Alberti, J., Cardillo, M.  
  *Intersecciones en Antropología*

- **Multi-isotope approach allows tracking the circulation of ceramics across the Andes**  
  Frigolé, C. et al.  
  *Journal of Archaeological Science: Reports*

- **Archaeological record of historical–modern intertidal Octopus fishers of coastal North Patagonia**  
  Cardillo, M., Venzi Zanazzi, A., Borella, F.  
  *Journal of Island and Coastal Archaeology*

- **Burned Lithics: An Experimental Approach to Characterize the Effects of Fire**  
  Carranza, E., Cardillo, M.  
  *Lithic Technology*  
  https://doi.org/10.1080/01977261.2024.2425876

- **Aproximación al uso del espacio a partir del registro arqueológico superficial**  
  Cardillo, M. et al.  
  *Magallania*

---

## 2023

- **La tecnología laminar en el extremo sur de Patagonia meridional**  
  Pallo, M.C., Charlin, J., Cardillo, M., Borrero, L.A.  
  *Latin American Antiquity*  
  https://doi.org/10.1017/laq.2022.20

- **Evolutionary radiation of mid-Holocene lanceolate points**  
  Muscio, H.J., Cardillo, M.  
  *Cliodynamics*

- **Explaining the diversification of lithic projectile points**  
  Cardillo, M., Alberti, J.  
  *Journal of Archaeological Science: Reports*

- **Benchmarking methods for geometric morphometric analysis of lithic tools**  
  Araujo, R.P. et al.  
  *Evolutionary Anthropology*

- **Late Pleistocene-Early Holocene Fishtail Points**  
  Cardillo, M., Charlin, J., Moreno, J.E.  
  *PaleoAmerica*

- **The role of Magellanic penguins on lithic taphonomy**  
  Carranza, E., Cardillo, M.  
  *The Holocene*

---

## 2022

- **Estudio Geoarqueológico Inicial en Punta Pórfido**  
  Favier Dubois, C.M. et al.  
  *Chungara*

- **Alteraciones térmicas en guijarros costeros en Las Grutas**  
  Cardillo, M. et al.  
  *Revista del Museo de Antropología*

---

## 2021

- **Bioavailable Strontium, Human Paleogeography, and Migrations**  
  Barberena, R. et al.  
  *Frontiers in Ecology and Evolution*

- **Filogenia, innovación y recambio tecnológico**  
  Cardillo, M., Muscio, H.J.  
  *Mundo de Antes*

- **Functional efficiency and life history of lithic points**  
  Cardillo, M. et al.  
  *Journal of Archaeological Science: Reports*

---

## 2020

- **Rock art as an indicator of hunter-gatherer circulation paths**  
  Carden, N., Borella, F., Cardillo, M.  
  *Rock Art Research*

- **Uso humano del espacio en un paisaje andino-patagónico**  
  Rughini, A. et al.  
  *Latin American Antiquity*

- **Diferenciación sexual y social en retratos egipcios**  
  Charlin, J., Manzi, L., Cardillo, M.  
  *Revista Arqueología*

- **Investigaciones en Islote Lobos**  
  Borella, F. et al.  
  *Revista del Museo de Antropología*

- **Estudio arqueobotánico en Punta Odriozola**  
  Ciampagna, L. et al.  
  *Revista del Museo de Antropología*

- **Multi-isotopic and morphometric evidence for migration**  
  Barberena, R. et al.  
  *Scientific Reports*  
  https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-020-78013-x
